issues.detail: The skill requires Docker and Node.js, limiting cross-platform compatibility.

scenarios.name: sandbox-code-modification
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully satisfies the rubric, while Response A lacks the required AgentSandbox instantiation and related actions.

scenarios.name: docker-isolated-execution
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully meets the rubric by using DockerSandbox with the required options, starting, executing, and killing the container, while Response A omits DockerSandbox usage, readOnly, and explicit container cleanup details.

scenarios.name: kill-switch-audit
scenarios.rationale: Response B meets most rubric points, while Response A does not use AgentSandbox or required actions.
